rows.reference: The spinal canal is wide, and the spinal cord follows a normal course and caliber.NEWLINE In T2-weighted sequences, the intervertebral spaces appear hypointense, and a posterior disc protrusion at C6-C7 is evident, which deforms the dura.NEWLINE No changes in signal intensity in the spinal parenchyma are noted.NEWLINE Multiple axial cuts at different levels of the cervical spine confirm the central and posterior disc protrusion at C6-C7.NEWLINE

rows.reference: A retrograde puncture of the left CFA was performed. Using a micropuncture set under ultrasound and fluoroscopy guidance. DSA of the left lower extremity was conducted using Visipaque contrast medium through the puncture sheath. The equipment was removed. Manual compression was applied until hemostasis was achieved.

rows.reference: Functionally, the lower leg is supplied by two vessels  - ATP and fibular artery - . There is a significant delay in the flow of the ATA. But no narrowing or stenosis was detected along the vessel. The fibular artery terminates at the OSG. The ATP is patent and traceable up to the plantar arteries. The ATA is poorly contrasted.
